Off Calendar Jan-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:

No appearance is made in this matter.

On calendar:
DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The Court determines on its own motion that this action is a complex case within the meaning of Cal. R. Ct. 3.400. The parties should await an order deeming the case complex, assigning it to a single judge for all purposes, and setting an initial case management conference.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceeding not reported.
